---
description: Render per-artifact docs from inventory using bindings (the heavy generation step)
agent: brownfield

# /document

> The heavy step. For every artefact in `inventory.json`, load its binding, run extractors, render the pattern, validate, retry up to 3 times, then either write the doc or log a gap. **No `/review` follows** (auto-mode per [ADR-0007](../../../design/adr/0007-brownfield-auto-mode-self-healing.md)).

## Usage

```
/document [--project <name>] [--platform <name>] [--artifact-type <type>] [--instance <name>]
```

Filters allow partial runs:
- `--platform` — document only one platform's artefacts
- `--artifact-type` — document only one artifact type
- `--instance` — document only one specific instance

## Pre-conditions

- `inventory.json` exists at `_brownfield/inventory.json`
- `inventory.json` validates against `schemas/brownfield-inventory.v1.json`

## Execution flow

```
1. Load inventory.json
2. detect_modules(inventory)  (already done by /scan; re-confirms)
3. for each platform in inventory.platforms:
     for each artifactType in inventory.platforms[platform]:
       binding = load_binding(platform, artifactType)
       if not binding:
         log_gap UNSUPPORTED-PATTERN
         continue
       if binding.requires and not in inventory.detectedModules:
         skip silently (correct — module not installed)
         continue
       for each instance of artifactType:
         pattern = load_pattern(binding.pattern)
         data = run_extractors(binding.sourcePaths, binding.extractors, instance)
         cross_refs = compute_cross_refs(binding.crossRefs, instance, inventory)
         doc = render(pattern, data, cross_refs)
         for attempt in 1..N (default 3):
           issues = run_validators(binding.validators + global_validators, doc)
           if not issues:
             write(doc, binding.outputPath); record(COVERED, artifact); break
           doc = re_attempt_with_focused_prompt(doc, issues, attempt)
         else:
           log_gap EXCEEDED-RETRY-LIMIT
           write(doc with KNOWN_GAP markers, binding.outputPath)
           record(GAP-LOGGED, artifact)
4. Emit per-platform progress to console
```

## MCP tools invoked

- `brownfield_binding_load(platform, artifactType)`
- `brownfield_pattern_render(pattern, data, crossRefs)`
- `brownfield_extract(sourcePaths, extractors, instance)`
- `brownfield_cross_ref(crossRefs, instance, inventory)`
- `brownfield_validate(doc, scope, binding)`
- `brownfield_gap_log_append(project, entry)`
- `brownfield_coverage_tracker_record(project, artifact, status)`

## Output

- Per-artefact docs at the path declared by each binding's `outputPath` field — typically under `projects/{p}/_brownfield/docs-generated/`
- `gap-log.json` extended with `EXCEEDED-RETRY-LIMIT` / `BLOCKED-BY-BINARY` / `INFERENCE-LOW-CONFIDENCE` entries
- `coverage-tracker.json` updated (consumed by `/generate` to produce `coverage-report.md`)

## Per-binding output paths

Output paths follow the convention declared in each binding `outputPath:` field. Examples:

- `templates/bindings/d365-ce/entity.binding.yaml outputPath: "docs-generated/technical/data-model/entities/{name}.md"`
- `templates/bindings/d365-ce/plugin.binding.yaml outputPath: "docs-generated/technical/code/plugins/{name}.md"`
- `templates/bindings/integration/function-per-trigger.binding.yaml outputPath: "docs-generated/technical/integration/functions/{name}.md"`

## Idempotency

Re-running `/document` on the same inventory + same source inputs produces the same docs (modulo retry attempts; LLM stochasticity may cause minor variance — drift-check tolerance applies).
